overview.description: The Toews Agility Shares Hedged Risk ETF (HRSK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund targets large-cap US equity market exposure through an actively managed ETF launched via a 351 exchange. The fund holds multiple asset classes including stocks, bonds, ETFs with exposure to stocks and bonds, and equity index futures and options. HRSK was launched on Jun 15, 2026 and is issued by Toews.
